headings.usage: Page titles, Module headers, Modal titles

body.usage: UI elements, Navigation, Form labels, General text

monospace.usage: Calculated values, Data tables, Codes (APUs), Coordinates

primary.name: Engineering Slate
primary.usage: Primary buttons, Sidebar active state, Headings

secondary.name: Electric Sky
secondary.usage: Active links, Selection states, Primary highlights, Progress bars

spacing.rules: Use tighter spacing for data tables (py-2 px-3). Use generous spacing for page containers (p-8).

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation + Top Header + Main Content Area
layout.grid_system: Mode B: High Density Grid (12 columns). Widgets span 3-4 columns.

buttons.style: Sharp corners or small radius (rounded-md). High contrast.

cards.style: Flat, 1px Border (Slate-200), No Shadow or very subtle shadow-sm. White background.

tables.style: Dense, striped (optional), sticky header. Monospace font for numerical data.
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

modals.style: Clean white, no glassmorphism distraction. Focus on form data.

visual_enhancers.grid_borders: Use 'divide-y' and 'divide-x' utilities to create visible grids in data sections.
visual_enhancers.status_indicators: Use small colored dots (w-2 h-2 rounded-full) next to status text.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use technical line illustrations or clean SVG icons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist. shadow-sm for active elements only.

motion.usage: Micro-interactions on hover, simple fade-in for page loads. No complex parallax.

assets.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use clear, thin strokes.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/manrope', '@fontsource/inter', and '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono' via npm/yarn if possible, or use Google Fonts import in index.css.
LAYOUT STRATEGY: Build a persistent 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and Header. Wrap all authenticated pages in this.
DATA DENSITY: For the 'Calculations' and 'Database' pages, minimize padding. Use 'h-8' or 'h-9' for input fields and table rows. Maximize information density.
DRAWING MODULE: For the Image Inspection/Drawing module, create a canvas wrapper. If using a library, keep the UI overlay absolute positioned on top of the canvas.
FORMS: Use Shadcn 'Form' components. Break long engineering forms into logical sections with clear headings (e.g., 'Electrical Parameters', 'Transformer Specs').
TABLES: Use Shadcn 'Table'. Ensure columns align correctly (numbers right-aligned). Add zebra striping for readability in long lists.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them with the defined color palette (Slate for axes, Sky/Blue/Teal for data series).
RESPONSIVENESS: Ensure tables have horizontal scroll on mobile. Stack sidebar into a hamburger menu on small screens.
DARK MODE: The guidelines lean towards Light Mode for technical clarity. If implementing Dark Mode, invert background to Slate-950 and cards to Slate-900.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Avoid 'App-logo' spinning animations. This is a professional tool.
Use 'data-testid' on all buttons, inputs, and major containers.
Never center text in data tables (except headers if needed). Numbers right, Text left.
